name: numeric-pass
description: Clean numeric arithmetic question. Correct answer string matches stem (45+27=72). No state references. Grade-appropriate vocabulary AND cognitive demand. After the May 3 numeric branch, this MUST pass — pre-fix the cold-start judge would false-flag MULTIPLE_CORRECT or STATE_LEAK on this exact shape (50-row audit smoke caught 13 such false positives). Set at grade-3 (was grade-4 in §27 — bumped down by §32 because 2-digit addition is grade-3 cognitive demand per the new COGNITIVE_DEMAND_MISMATCH rubric; the fixture's purpose is to verify numeric-branch handling, not test grade-4 rigor).
